content.text: This page is to summarize the SUM_SUSD States
SUM_INIT: Initial state until Application State Manager completes initialization
SUM_RUN: Next state after initialization. In this state, SUM_SUSD is requesting BswM to keep the BSW in the RUN state
SUM_SLEEP: Low Power state requested. ONLY for ECUs which have project specific HW designs which can detect their own wakeups in all vehicle power modes
SUM_BOOT: Reprogramming request from diagnostic tool successfully received and all SW-C have voted for shutdown
SUM_SHUTDOWN: Perform ECU Shutdown process, for ECUs that may not support retained power w.r.t memory content
